requestedAction: Create one branch, update approved Social Media Management System v1.1 starter files, and open one pull request in gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system.
scope: This approval package, if converted into an active approved lock, allows exactly one future GitHub builder milestone for Social Media Management System v1.1 in the existing private repository gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system. The allowed future actions are limited to creating one owner-approved branch, updating only owner-approved static starter app files, opening exactly one pull request to main, and stopping before merge, deployment, social connection, credentials, posting, scheduling, analytics API use, n8n activation, paid tools, real client private data, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner says stop or revoke, the expiration passes, the target repository changes, the target branch changes, more than one pull request is needed, merge or deployment is requested, validation or boot check fails, a conflict appears, an incident opens for this scope, any prohibited action becomes necessary, or the action expands beyond one branch, approved static app file updates, and one pull request.

evidence.reference: Current sprint requested an approval package only for Social Media Management System v1.1, with no execution.
npm.cmd run validate, npm.cmd run boot:check, and node --test tests/*.test.mjs must pass immediately before execution.
